violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Per PIC, ice is not used in direct contact with food or beverages (cold holding only). Ice machine to be taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/23/2026

A coffee carafe was observed draining into the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. PIC moved carafe during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025

Sausage was observed held at 115 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Staff reheated during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
A case of bottled water was observed stored on the floor in the storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 10/22/2025
The non-food contact surface of the guest ice machines have an accumulation of debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
The outside dumpster is not covered. Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/02/2024
The refuse area had an accumulation of rubbish and debris. Refuse areas to be maintained clean to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 07/16/2024
